gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 approved after benchmark-plan/legacy CLI threading gaps, ReleaseBundlePlanConfig positional compatibility, and README strict follow-up guidance findings were fixed with regression coverage.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_benchmark_plan.py tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q -> 184 passed
poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests -> passed
poetry run python -m document_kv_cache.pr_evidence --validate-directory pr-evidence -> ok=true
what_changed: Added requirements_matrix as an optional release-bundle artifact and a required strict V1 artifact.
Threaded the V1 requirements matrix through release-bundle CLI, legacy compatibility CLI, and benchmark-plan strict release commands.
Validated the V1 requirements matrix Markdown and documented both direct release-bundle and benchmark-plan follow-up flags.
why: Strict V1 bundles should carry the same auditable requirements map that tracks implemented package evidence and remaining target g5/Unity Catalog release gates.
